Notes: Pre-release build 2.24-101-g897c7ad (2017-04-26) - required for Windows 10 Creators Update and newer to avoid a service-start failure present in the 2.24 stable release, per https://nssm.cc/download. Hash computed against win64/nssm.exe extracted from the release zip, not the zip itself. Update this value manually and re-verify when a newer NSSM build is pinned.
